sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 42

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 42:1
items.html: (to the question) When there are discernments of GAR in the Gevurot, they are considered male Gevurot; and when they lack GAR, they are considered female Gevurot. (p. 808, Item 105; p. 759, Item 40)
